시편 115:1.content: Not to us, Yahweh, not to us, but to your name give glory, for your loving kindness, and for your truth’s sake.

시편 115:2.content: Why should the nations say, “Where is their God, now?”

시편 115:3.content: But our God is in the heavens. He does whatever he pleases.

시편 115:4.content: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

시편 115:5.content: They have mouths, but they don’t speak. They have eyes, but they don’t see.

시편 115:6.content: They have ears, but they don’t hear. They have noses, but they don’t smell.

시편 115:7.content: They have hands, but they don’t feel. They have feet, but they don’t walk, neither do they speak through their throat.

시편 115:8.content: Those who make them will be like them; yes, everyone who trusts in them.

시편 115:9.content: Israel, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

시편 115:10.content: House of Aaron, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

시편 115:11.content: You who fear Yahweh, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

시편 115:12.content: Yahweh remembers us. He will bless us. He will bless the house of Israel. He will bless the house of Aaron.

시편 115:13.content: He will bless those who fear Yahweh, both small and great.

시편 115:14.content: May Yahweh increase you more and more, you and your children.

시편 115:15.content: Blessed are you by Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.

시편 115:16.content: The heavens are Yahweh’s heavens, but he has given the earth to the children of men.

시편 115:17.content: The dead don’t praise Yah, neither any who go down into silence;

시편 115:18.content: but we will bless Yah, from this time forward and forever more. Praise Yah!
